sourceArchive.sizeBasis: zippedKB is each offline HTML file's compressed size inside the uploaded ZIP; final re-zipping may differ slightly.

methodology.includedOnly: Single-file .html games found under html games/offline/.
methodology.popularityBasis: Downloads, monthly users, reviews/votes, SteamDB/public game-platform activity, media coverage, and franchise popularity. Paint by Number is custom, so popularity is based on the paint-by-number/color-by-number genre.
methodology.categoryNotes: desktopOnly/mobileFriendly are best-fit classifications for site planning and should be validated in the final iframe on target phones/desktops. multiplayer indicates the game/franchise or public browser version supports multiplayer/local co-op, but true online multiplayer may not work offline without a backend.

popularityScale.4: high / major web or niche hit

games.title: Candy Crush
games.recommendationReason: Keep: huge mainstream puzzle popularity and cozy pattern play.

games.title: Among Us
games.multiplayerType: multiplayer franchise; offline HTML true online/local multiplayer not guaranteed without a backend/server
